title: T'iaz
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conflicting|[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]]|[[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]]}} {{Character |type=Dark Jedi |image=[[File:Tiaz-EmpiresEnd2.jpg]] |name=T'iaz |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]][[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]] |species=[[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Green]] |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Dark Empire]] *[[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adepts]] |masters=[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Master…let ''T'iaz'' deal with this uncivilized youth.!''"
"''''Sorry, T'iaz…I'm not ready to join my uncivilized sister, yet!|The Emperor's physician and Rayf Ysanna|}} '''T'iaz''' was an alien [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] that served [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. He was killed at [[Kira Fortress]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] aiding the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] in the abduction of [[Anakin Solo]]. While there he engaged in a duel with [[Rayf Ysanna]] who sliced off his hand and disarmed him. ==Biography== [[File:Tiaz_with_Sidious_on_Korriban.jpg|thumb|left|220px|T'iaz (left) with Darth Sidious in the Valley of the Dark Lords.]] A member of a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]], T'iaz was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]], serving the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], [[Transfer essence|reborn]] in a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body.[[Dark Empire II 1|''Dark Empire II'' 1]] In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], due to treachery by the [[Emperor's physician]], who had sabotaged the Emperor's clone body before the Emperor had taken it,''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire]]'' Palpatine's clone body began to decay rapidly. The Emperor's other clone bodies had all been destroyed,[[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]] and he could not clone new bodies of himself, since the physician had also tampered with the genetic material. Palpatine attempted to produce new bodies, using genetic samples from captured [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Ysanna/Legends|Ysanna]] shamans from the planet [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], but [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] foiled that plan.[[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]] At a loss as how to save his life, Palpatine embarked to the ancient Sith world of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] in order to consult the spirits of the ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] buried there. Arriving at the planet aboard his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the ''[[Eclipse II]]'', Palpatine used a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] to descend into the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]], accompanied by T'iaz and another Dark Side Adept. As they traveled through the ancient Sith crypt, T'iaz felt the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] power emanating from the place. The Sith spirits told Palpatine that the only way for him to survive would be to transfer his spirit inside [[Anakin Solo]], the newborn son of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. T'iaz swore that he would protect his Master when he would become a child, and would raise him until adulthood. Knowing that Anakin Solo was currently aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], en route to the planet [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], the Emperor and the Adepts returned to the ''Eclipse II'' and traveled to the [[Japrael system/Legends|Onderon system]]. [[File:Rayf_defeats_Tiaz.jpg|thumb|250px|Rayf Ysanna defeats T'iaz.]] The massive starship arrived in the system simultaneously with the ''Millennium Falcon''. However, the ''Falcon'' was able to evade pursuit and landed planetside, although it soon left Onderon once again. Sensing that the child was not aboard the ''Falcon'' anymore, as it was piloted by the co-pilot [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and the Jedi [[Vima-Da-Boda]], Palpatine chose not to pursue the ship. Instead, he decided to land on the surface of the planet, taking T'iaz and his physician with him. Posing as an old frail man, the Emperor was able to gain entrance inside [[Kira Fortress]], where Organa Solo was taking refuge with her children. The Emperor incapacitated Organa Solo and the droid [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. However, a pair of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], [[Rayf Ysanna]] and [[Empatojayos Brand]], arrived to join in the fight, having recently arrived with Skywalker on Onderon. Palpatine blasted Brand with Force lightning, removing him from the fight. However, doing so drained his strength. With Ysanna left standing, Palpatine let T'iaz engage him in battle. However, the darksider was easily overpowered and killed. Having regained his strength, Palpatine killed Ysanna. Skywalker and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] arrived to join the fight, with Solo killing the Emperor with a blaster shot. Palpatine attempted to transfer his essence into the body of Anakin Solo, but his spirit was intercepted by Brand, who dragged him into the Netherworld of the Force. ==Behind the scenes== The [[Empire's End (audio drama)|audio dramatization]] of ''[[Star Wars: Empire's End]]'' provides different information regarding T'iaz's death. In the audio drama, instead of going with Palpatine to the surface of Onderon, T'iaz remains to command the ''[[Eclipse II]]'' and dies when the vessel collides with the [[Galaxy Gun]] above [[Byss/Legends|Byss]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of T'iaz}} *[[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]] {{1st}} *[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Dark side adepts]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Personnel of the Dark Empire]]
